items.caption: A padlock with a key inserted, a lockout tag, and a cable tie. the padlock has a red label with the word "danger" and "locked out" printed on it. the lockout tag has a red and white striped background with the words "do not operate" printed in bold black letters. the cable tie is partially visible and appears to be made of a metallic material. the background is plain white, emphasizing the items.
